title: Gerrit Blaauw
body: Gerrit Anne "Gerry" Blaauw (17 July 1924 – 21 March 2018) was a Dutch computer scientist, known as one of the principal designers of the IBM System/360 line of computers, together with Fred Brooks, Gene Amdahl, and others.
categories: Academic staff of the University of Twente
Members of the Royal Netherlands Academy of Arts and Sciences
